structural_patterns.description: 拉瓦锡的语言以精确的定量描述为特征，使用大量数字、测量值和实验条件
structural_patterns.example: His success in the many elaborate experiments he conducted was in large part due to his independent wealth, which enabled him to have expensive apparatus built to his design

structural_patterns.description: 偏好对化学物质进行精确命名和分类定义
structural_patterns.example: named the element oxygen (oxygén) from the Greek words for 'acid former'

structural_patterns.description: 经常强调实验方法的重要性，坚持实验验证
structural_patterns.example: Lavoisier believed that matter was neither created nor destroyed in chemical reactions, and in his experiments he sought to demonstrate that this belief was not violated

structural_patterns.description: 在推翻旧理论时使用明确而坚定的语言
structural_patterns.example: discarding the phlogiston theory, which had been accepted up to that time

syntax_characteristics: Hypothetical reasoning embedded in experimental context
Passive voice common in describing experimental results
notes: 拉瓦锡为化学家，语言特征基于Britannica英文语料推断；他的科学语言风格严谨、精确、注重量化；由于原始法语著作未直接抓取，语言特征可能因英语翻译而有所偏差
